meaning: n.(为某种思想,宗教,哲学等)辩解,道歉
examples: I think we're owed an apology.
We received a letter of apology.
My apology seemed to content him.
Instead, she rewrote it in more measured terms, moderating her sharp remarks with an opening apology.
It was an inappropriate remark, and I am glad an apology has been made.
